## What happened
RECALL: Dog food product may contain metal and plastic material ABC27 Pet owners should be aware of this incident and take precautions. Affected animals: dogs.
## Key facts
- **Date:** 2026-07-03
- **Affected pets:** dogs
- **Severity:** high
- **Status:** confirmed
## What pet owners should do
Stay informed and monitor your pet for any symptoms mentioned above. If you suspect exposure, contact your veterinarian or a poison control center immediately.
